$curated: State-composition gate for import (Template B ‚Äî import.gen.json has 0 MxCard; the kit's source cards + preview table are custom markup, so assert the keyed control SET per state). Chrome (screen/appbar/back) excluded (matches dashboard.states.json). The kit models import as a 5-step WIZARD (source‚Üímapping‚Üípreview‚Üídup-warning‚Üídone) with the controls SPLIT across steps (column pickers in `mapping`, do-import in `preview`/`dup-warning`, go-deck in `done`); the FE is a SINGLE scrolling screen (intended v1 divergence ‚Äî intent-ledger; consistent with the business doc BR-2 preview-before-write + soft-dup non-blocking, D-025) that renders map-picks + do-import TOGETHER once _rows is set, and keeps them after import while appending go-deck. So the FE's node-sets map to NONE of the kit's split wizard states 1:1. The per-state node membership here follows the KIT derivation because states_check requires curated ‚äÜ the spec's per-state set, and NO kit state holds {map-picks, do-import} together (the wizard splits map-picks into `mapping` and do-import into `preview`/`dup-warning`) ‚Äî so an FE-faithful combined set cannot be expressed under any single kit state name here. The composition loop therefore drives ONLY `source` through the universe (asserting every body node ‚Äî map-term-pick, map-meaning-pick, do-import, go-deck ‚Äî is ABSENT on the initial screen, catching any leak). The FE's real combined body states are instead FULLY composition-checked by two TARGETED tests: loaded (after paste) = map-picks + do-import present, go-deck absent; done (after do-import) = all four present (the FE keeps _rows and appends go-deck). Together these give the FE-faithful composition gate that the states.json loop cannot (states_check binds it to the kit split). dup-warning is a soft-dup count in the result line, not a keyed pre-import callout (intent-ledger). Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/import_export/import_states_test.dart.
